description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 機場快綫市區預辦登機服務

2024-10-05T06:22:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that Due to baggage handling system equipment fault, In-town Check-in service at Hong Kong Station and Kowloon Station is adjusted to 120 minutes before scheduled flight departure time. Passengers are advised to leave earlier for the Airport for baggage check-in.
2024-10-05T06:22:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知， 由於行李處理系統機件故障，香港站及九龍站市區預辦登機服務調整至航班起飛前120分鐘截止。 乘客請考慮提早前往機場辦理登機手續。

2024-10-05T07:05:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that In-town Check-in services close out time at Hong Kong Station and Kowloon Station have resumed to 90 minutes.
